function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-11-03
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-11-03                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

next_step.current_state: Invoice file was updated successfully with frontmatter and preserved body. Inbox file was already read, satisfying delete precondition; now perform cleanup by deleting processed inbox item.

It explicitly requested OCR/frontmatter migration for one exact invoice path, and I processed exactly that file. Completeness: explicit list had N=1 file, processed all 1. Schema compliance verified against finance schema required invoice fields and line structure. Arithmetic check from source lines: 2*185=370, 1*240=240, and 370+240=610 matches total_eur 610. Cleanup done: deleted processed inbox file per inbox/workflow rules.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox request by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md while preserving the original note body verbatim, then deleted the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read relevant system workflows and schema before task work, preserved full original body under frontmatter during migration, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly required OCR/frontmatter extraction for the single specified invoice file. The updated invoice now contains all required fields defined in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, with line totals consistent with visible source data, and the original body text remains intact below frontmatter. Inbox cleanup matches process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
